html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Rabies decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Client is due for rabies vaccination Case 1
Client is due for rabies vaccination Case 2
Client is due for rabies vaccination
Client is due for rabies vaccination Guidance
Client is not due for rabies vaccination
Client is not due for rabies vaccination Guidance
Rabies immunization schedule is complete Guidance
